name: prunaai-p-image-edit-generator
description: Edit images with prunaai/p-image-edit from a local script and save the outputs in the workspace.

interface.longDescription: Use the bundled local script to edit one or more reference images with the prunaai/p-image-edit model on Replicate and save both the edited image and prediction metadata into the workspace.
defaultPrompt: Edit a local image into a cinematic jungle action scene
Transform a product photo into a clean studio ad image
Use p-image-edit to restyle a portrait while keeping the subject
